role: Core utilities and infrastructure modules for ArchSpine CLI, covering CLI presentation, filesystem operations, user prompts, git hook management, locking, path normalization, and agent instruction synchronization.
responsibility: Handles CLI banner rendering, interactive confirmations, atomic file writes, git hook lifecycle (install/remove), file-based locking for concurrency, POSIX path normalization, and synchronizing ArchSpine-managed blocks (agent instructions, gitignore, etc.) into project files.

children.role: File sync orchestrator for ArchSpine-managed project artifacts (agent instructions, gitignore, scripts, blocks).

Constants and template definitions module for ArchSpine's agent briefing blocks, MCP tools documentation, health snapshot content, and managed ignore-file entries (.gitignore, .spineignore, .gitattributes, .ignore).
Barrel module aggregating agent instruction utility exports from two submodules.
CLI presentation module that renders colored ASCII art banners for the ArchSpine command-line interface.
CLI utility providing interactive user confirmation prompts for terminal-based workflows.
Pure utility module for computing deterministic content-addressed hashes (structural and semantic footprints) of file skeletons and semantic summaries.
Infrastructure utility class for atomic filesystem operations. Provides safe file write and file copy operations with temporary file staging and directory creation.
Git hook lifecycle manager responsible for installing, updating, and removing the ArchSpine pre-commit hook in a Git repository.
File-based distributed mutex utility ensuring exclusive access to the ArchSpine runtime directory across concurrent processes.
Internal path normalization utility that converts arbitrary OS-specific paths to a canonical POSIX-separator, repo-relative format.
